input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.3.3
            TITLE: cost scenario

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.3.3: Cost Scenario
S.3.3.3 Cost Scenario  
Teams will respond to a challenge related to cost or manufacturing of the vehicle.

final_answer: rule S.3.3.3: Cost Scenario Teams will respond to a challenge related to cost or manufacturing of the vehicle.
